author: alberto98fx
description: Get notified when you stop typing to stay motivated.

manifest.author: alberto98fx
manifest.description: Get notified when you stop typing to stay motivated.
manifest.name: Idle Monitor

name: Idle Monitor

releases.author: alberto98fx
releases.description:
- Removed the h2 heading (“Idle Notifier Settings”) in favor of no heading, matching the guidelines for a single settings section. 
- Switched from Title Case to sentence case for setting labels (“Idle time threshold (ms)” instead of “Idle Time Threshold (ms)”).
- Replaced this.statusBarItem.addEventListener('mouseenter', ...) with this.registerDomEvent(...) to let Obsidian handle the cleanup automatically.

releases.author: alberto98fx
releases.description:
## TL;DR: Idle Monitor Plugin for Obsidian 🚀
- Track Idle Time: See how long you've been inactive directly in the status bar.
- Customizable Settings: Adjust idle thresholds, time formats (12/24-hour), and mouse activity inclusion.
- Visual Enhancements: Choose text colors or enable a glowing rainbow gradient for the status text.
- Hover Insights: Hover over the idle status to see when you last stopped typing.
- Ignore Alt/CMD keys and other special keys
